title: MCP as an interface
summary: My relationship with AI has been quite unusual over the past year or so, and despite working for startups exclusively devoted to building AI based tech I didn't use much of it in my actual workflow. Well, not much more than a Q&A with Claude. So, if you asked me about integrating
